title: Anti-spoof model smoke test

failed_candidate.failure: outputs p(synth)≈0.0 for all clips regardless of input

scripts: Hello, this is an automated message from your bank.
We detected unusual activity on your account. Please confirm your identity.
Your package delivery has been rescheduled. Press one to continue.
This is the IRS. You have an outstanding tax balance.
Your computer has been compromised. Do not turn it off.
Congratulations, you have won a five hundred dollar gift card.
This is your car warranty specialist calling.
Please verify the last four digits of your social security number.
Your subscription will renew automatically tomorrow.
Press one to speak with a representative about your loan.
We detected unusual activity on your account. Please confirm your identity.
This is the IRS. You have an outstanding tax balance.
Congratulations, you have won a five hundred dollar gift card.
synth_misses.hypothesis: Short/simple phrases produce less acoustic artifact; likely short-audio boundary effect in wav2vec2 feature extraction

notes: fp32 size (378 MB) exceeds the 200 MB spec; fp16 on T4 is ~189 MB which passes.
3 synth misses are a known limitation — document in Limitations slide.
MelodyMachine/Deepfake-audio-detection-V2 always predicts real; do not use.
